[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                                      [ch]C[/ch]

(hold up now)

You look good, I will not lie[/tab]

But if you ask where I’m staying tonight[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]G[/ch]                   
I gotta be like oh, baby, no, baby, you got me all wrong, baby[/tab]

My baby’s already got all of my love[/tab]
